username.description: OnePageCRM API user ID, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username.

password.description: OnePageCRM API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: OnePageCRM API base URL override for tests or proxies.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

action_id.description: action id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

attachment_id.description: attachment id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

call_id.description: call id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

company_field_id.description: company field id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

company_id.description: company id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

contact_id.description: contact id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

custom_field_id.description: custom field id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

deal_field_id.description: deal field id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

deal_id.description: deal id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

filter_id.description: filter id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

last_id.description: last id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

lead_source_id.description: lead source id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

meeting_id.description: meeting id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

note_id.description: note id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

notification_id.description: notification id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

owner_id.description: owner id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

pipeline_id.description: pipeline id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

predefined_action_group_id.description: predefined action group id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

predefined_action_id.description: predefined action id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

predefined_item_group_id.description: predefined item group id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

predefined_item_id.description: predefined item id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

relationship_id.description: relationship id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

relationship_type_id.description: relationship type id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

status_id.description: status id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

tag_name.description: tag name for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

user_id.description: user id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.

webhook_id.description: webhook id for parameterized OnePageCRM streams.
